transcript: Yeah, this is Orville callin’. Yeah, I moved in 'round the way from ya the other day.
And I’m missing some newspapers up here, miss. Uh… Guys seen those at all? Any of my newspapers I have delivered to my home here. [sniffs]
Well I got your number from Brian. [exhales] He didn’t wanna talk to me about this.—
That’s correct. I’m missin’ six, seven newspapers here. Not just the sports or the weather section—the whole newspaper! So what’s goin’ on around here?! [delay, pitch-shifted]—
So what is it you’re—? What are you—? [laughing] What are you proposing, that I’ve taken your newspapers?
Well somebody in your residence has done sumpin’! We need to do sumpin’, here.
Like I say, I’m new to the area. The white one. With the accents? I waved to ya the other day up 'ere.
What can we do about this up here? [exhales] [delay, pitch-shifted]—
I’m not sure which house you’re t— Which—which house—? Which house is mine, honey?

Just one adjacent to me. I’m new here. I don’t know what kinda thing this community is into but, uh, what do you suggest I do? I’m missin’… a week’s worth o’ news here! I don’t know what’s goin’ on around here! [exhales] [delay, pitch-shifted]
Well can you give me a reimbursement o’ some kind if I stop by?
What’s up? Can you hear me?
I can hear you! Can you hear me?
Not much, I was just making— What?!
Hello? What is—? What are you—? What’s goin’ on?
What the fuck? I got a call… and some guy said "I have Pamela on the phone here who’s saying that somebody is stealing her papers and wants to file a report." And he just put me through to you.
No. Sounds like— I ignored the call 'cause—
Well you—you called me, so… What I, uh…—

What I wanted— What? Yeah. What I wanted to tell him was, you know, he can come on over and we’ll sit him down in front of the fire and we’ll make him a nice little… place to sit and we’ll stories so he doesn’t need those newspapers anymore.
Well, I was gonna tell him he can just fuck off… and stop calling us.—
Well he can come on over. I’d love to entertain that man! He sounds like lots of fun!—
Now, he told me Brian gave me his number. So somehow they’re—they’re watchin’ our whole family, so it’s kinda cool. Ya know?
That’s weird. Alright, well I’m gonna get back to work now. I’ll talk to ya in a little bit.
